moduleDescription: This module parses an XML document and creates its XML tree representation.

entries.name: XmlError
entries.code:
XmlError = object of ValueError
  errors*: seq[string]       ## All detected parsing errors.
entries.description: Exception that is raised for invalid XML.

entries.name: parseXml
entries.description: Parses the XML from stream s and returns a XmlNode. Every occurred parsing error is added to the errors sequence.

entries.name: parseXml
entries.description: Parses the XML from stream s and returns a XmlNode. All parsing errors are turned into an XmlError exception.

entries.name: parseXml
entries.description: Parses the XML from string str and returns a XmlNode. All parsing errors are turned into an XmlError exception.

entries.name: loadXml
entries.description: Loads and parses XML from file specified by path, and returns a XmlNode. Every occurred parsing error is added to the errors sequence.

entries.name: loadXml
entries.description: Loads and parses XML from file specified by path, and returns a XmlNode. All parsing errors are turned into an XmlError exception.
